action.reasoning: Observation: Iter2 failed immediately due to IndentationError on 'def evaluate' (extra leading whitespace after comment). Iter1 baseline was 0.0 success (20k steps too few for Minigrid). Analysis: Code structure (SB3 PPO + FlatObsWrapper + SubprocVecEnv + MlpPolicy) is valid and matches predict.py; post-train eval and metrics.jsonl logging are good ideas but broken by syntax; 1M steps across 10 envs should yield >0 success on easier ones like DoorKey/LavaGap. Decision: Fix indentation and minor style issues in train.py (no other changes), rerun with 1M timesteps to get first non-zero baseline, submit_eval to measure progress and iteration time (~few min expected).
